changelog: **Spec filename casing gate**: Renamed 20 uppercase `.md` files under `spec/21-app/05-prompts/`, `spec/21-app/05-prompts/macros/`, `spec/2026-spec/_quarantine/`, `spec/2026-spec/01-prompt-spec/`, and `spec/2026-spec/` to lowercase hyphen-case (e.g. `RELEASE-CHECKLIST.md` → `release-checklist.md`, `OWNERS.md` → `owners.md`). Updated every cross-reference under `spec/` to match.

Version bump: 3.54.0 → 3.55.0 across `manifest.json`, `src/shared/constants.ts`, `version.json`, all standalone-script `instruction.ts` / `shared-state.ts` files, and root `readme.md` pinned-version snippets.
